strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, embedded, low-latency systems, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform running on Kubernetes
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
concerns: No director- or principal-level scope in career history; roles top out at Staff/Senior individual contributor
AI experience is recent (~1 year) and tooling-focused, with no recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving org-level technical strategy

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products

response.justification: The candidate clears the minimum bar: a BS in Computer Science from MIT and roughly 19 years of engineering experience spanning Node.js/TypeScript product work, low-latency DLang microservices at Dunnhumby, and cloud deployment with AWS CDK and Kubernetes. The founder role at GISCollective and current MCP/agentic-tooling work at re:cinq evidence the preferred entrepreneurial and AI-builder qualities. However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the résumé shows no principal-level scope, no strategic customer advisory work, no advanced AI degree, and no demonstrated recognized AI expertise — the AI contribution is one year of internal tooling rather than shipped AI products or platforms. Strong senior engineer, but the evidence does not support the seniority and AI-recognition requirements of this specific role.
